intended_use: The ECG-AI LEF 12-Lead algorithm is software intended to aid in earlier detection of Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction (LVEF) less than or equal to 40% in adults at risk for heart failure.
intended_use_full: The ECG-AI LEF 12-Lead algorithm is software intended to aid in earlier detection of Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction (LVEF) less than or equal to 40% in adults at risk for heart failure.
target_condition: Left Ventricular Ejection Fraction (LVEF) less than or equal to 40%
